title: Artistic Social Media Caption
scenario: Create a social media caption for a photography contest that showcases stunning landscapes and cityscapes. The caption should highlight the beauty and diversity of the world's most breathtaking destinations. Use evocative language and vivid imagery to transport the viewer to the locations. The caption should be at least 50 words but no more than 120 words.
constraints: Must use evocative language and vivid imagery to describe the destinations
Must highlight the beauty and diversity of the locations
Must be at least 50 words but no more than 120 words

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the caption use vivid imagery to transport the viewer to the locations?
Does the caption meet the specified constraints (word count and tone)?
Does the caption convey a sense of wonder and awe?
